api.auth: API key (x-goog-api-key header or ?key= query param)

avoid: delicate code refactors where correctness is critical

prompting.responds_best_to: Explicit instructions with the format spelled out and an example; benefits from restating key constraints in long prompts.
prompting.avoid: Assuming it will infer a strict format — over-specify.
prompting.system_prompt_prefix: Follow the requested output format exactly; be concise and add no extra commentary.

quirks: Verified, reliable predecessor to the Gemini 3 line — safe default for Google-stack long-context work
Strong long-context and multimodal at moderate cost
Looser instruction-following — over-specify and give examples
Hedges and over-explains — ask for directness

handoff.output_format_instruction: Demand strict format with an example, restated at the end of long prompts.
handoff.evaluation_notes: Tighten verbosity, confirm format adherence, and fact-check specifics; good for drafts Claude refines.
